unchangedJobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Napapijri. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Napapijri is looking for an exceptional Allocator Intern to join our DTC (Direct To Consumer) team based in Stabio, Switzerland. As Allocator Intern you will support the development of our Owned & Operated Outlet and Full Price business. You will collaborate closely with the Merchandise Planner, Buyer, and Sales Team to ensure that inventory is managed to the planned constraints and business goals. You will have a direct impact on the day-by-day life of our teams and being accountable for performance monitoring to support informed decision. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Allocator Intern: - Supports Inventory Plans through the execution of initial seasonal inventory allocations and the weekly/daily replenishment activities - Focus on store & Channels inventory levels - STO (Stock Transfer Order ) Management, Shipping delivery Schedule, Delivery Plans, back to DC management (in season and end of season) arranging pick-up with local couriers - Performance & stock analysis to support planning team - Contribute to historical data analysis, inventory and communication set up and results monitoring during Key Centre activations - Contribute to properly set up promotions in the system - Contribute to keep a constant communication flow with key stakeholders (Field, sales team,..) How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - A University Bachelor or Master’s degree in Economic, Statistic, or related fields is required as a pre-requisite - Strong analytical skills and knowledge. Previous experience in retail planning and/or allocation is preferred. - Advantage knowledge of Microsoft Excel. Ability to create reports that meet business needs and data-visualization dashboards - Ability to analyse, present and communicate information in a manner that allows informed decision-making - Trading mentality: ability to work in team maximising communication between different functions, challenge results and information to identify challenges, drive for results and be profit-focused. - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Consolidation of your analytical skills (improving trading capabilities & performance analysis) - Manage a full allocation process from order creation to stock management - Promotion planning & management (In Season & End of Season) - Work in a dynamic DTC environment with an agile and adaptable team The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260218-0006

unchangedJobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Sales Intern for Smartwool & icebreaker. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Ready to help shape how Smartwool & Icebreaker show up across Zalando, Amazon, and other digital platforms across EMEA? Join our Digital Platforms team and support two purpose-led, merino-obsessed outdoor brands in growing their presence with key digital partners. Contribute to the daily execution and long‑term evolution of our digital marketplace presence, helping us drive visibility, conversion, and brand excellence across key online partners. Support platform coordination, performance monitoring, and cross-functional collaboration to keep our digital ecosystem running smoothly. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for as a Digital Platforms Intern: - Coordinate daily activities across digital marketplaces and strategic accounts to keep launches, updates, and optimizations on track. - Support initiatives to drive conversion by ensuring products, content, and campaigns land effectively across platforms. - Develop and refine tools, trackers, and processes to help the team monitor performance and unlock new opportunities. - Contribute to relationship‑building with both internal and external partners, helping strengthen collaboration. - Bring fresh ideas to help expand Smartwool & Icebreaker’s presence across digital environments. - Assist with additional projects within the Digital Platforms team as needed. unchangedJobs.title: AI & Digital Innovation Intern - EMEA Internship Program
unchangedJobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
unchangedJobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as AI & Digital Innovation Intern for the Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Bring your builder mindset to scale AI across iconic outdoor brands. We’re hiring an AI & Digital Innovation Intern to drive rapid experimentation with tools and workflows that improve digital experiences end - to - end. Drive rapid experimentation across ecommerce by evaluating and testing digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences and team productivity. Collaborate cross functionally with engineering, design, and marketing to pilot solutions, research emerging trends in AI/DXP, and present clear recommendations backed by lightweight experiments and metrics. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as AI & Digital Innovation Intern : - Assist in evaluating and testing new digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences across e-commerce storefronts - Collaborate with engineering, design, and marketing teams to support project delivery and cross-functional communication - Research emerging trends in e-commerce, AI, and digital experience platforms and present findings to the team - Craft and refine prompts & guardrails for internal AI tools to support tasks like content ideation, QA, and consumer insights. - Frame problems into hypotheses and design lightweight experiments (pilots/AB tests, before after studies), define success metrics, and report outcomes with clear narratives. How you will make a difference You’ll make a difference by bringing a entrepreneur mindset—spotting opportunities, trying things quickly, and turning simple ideas into real, measurable improvements. Your curiosity for AI and talent for crafting smart prompts will help our teams experiment faster and unlock new ways of working. Skills that will make you succeed: - Problem framing & experimentation skills —ability to translate ambiguous needs into clear hypotheses, simple test designs, and meaningful, business relevant metrics. - E-commerce and DXP intuition —familiarity with storefront UX, content workflows, CMS/DXP concepts (nice to have, not mandatory). - Storytelling that drives decisions —turn complex tests into crisp narratives, demos, and recommendations for nontechnical stakeholders. - An engineering degree is nice to have, but not required —we care most about your curiosity, projects, and evidence of impact. What’s in it for you In the role of AI & Digital Innovation Intern, you will work side by side with engineering, design, and marketing; learn how decisions travel from strategy to storefront. Gain a front row seat to ecommerce, AI, and DXP trends in a multi - brand environment with global reach. We will support you with ad hoc trainings and networking opportunities across other functions and brands! At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Handson AI in the real world: go from idea to pilot to measurable impact across multiple brands’ ecommerce experiences. - Mentorship & craft growth: guided learning in experimentation, prompt design, and AI product thinking; access to team playbooks and internal training. - Portfolio ready outcomes: ship case studies, prompt libraries, enablement assets, and experiment readouts you can proudly showcase. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011

descriptionByLocale.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as AI & Digital Innovation Intern for the Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Bring your builder mindset to scale AI across iconic outdoor brands. We’re hiring an AI & Digital Innovation Intern to drive rapid experimentation with tools and workflows that improve digital experiences end - to - end. Drive rapid experimentation across ecommerce by evaluating and testing digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences and team productivity. Collaborate cross functionally with engineering, design, and marketing to pilot solutions, research emerging trends in AI/DXP, and present clear recommendations backed by lightweight experiments and metrics. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as AI & Digital Innovation Intern : - Assist in evaluating and testing new digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences across e-commerce storefronts - Collaborate with engineering, design, and marketing teams to support project delivery and cross-functional communication - Research emerging trends in e-commerce, AI, and digital experience platforms and present findings to the team - Craft and refine prompts & guardrails for internal AI tools to support tasks like content ideation, QA, and consumer insights. - Frame problems into hypotheses and design lightweight experiments (pilots/AB tests, before after studies), define success metrics, and report outcomes with clear narratives. How you will make a difference You’ll make a difference by bringing a entrepreneur mindset—spotting opportunities, trying things quickly, and turning simple ideas into real, measurable improvements. Your curiosity for AI and talent for crafting smart prompts will help our teams experiment faster and unlock new ways of working. Skills that will make you succeed: - Problem framing & experimentation skills —ability to translate ambiguous needs into clear hypotheses, simple test designs, and meaningful, business relevant metrics. - E-commerce and DXP intuition —familiarity with storefront UX, content workflows, CMS/DXP concepts (nice to have, not mandatory). - Storytelling that drives decisions —turn complex tests into crisp narratives, demos, and recommendations for nontechnical stakeholders. - An engineering degree is nice to have, but not required —we care most about your curiosity, projects, and evidence of impact. What’s in it for you In the role of AI & Digital Innovation Intern, you will work side by side with engineering, design, and marketing; learn how decisions travel from strategy to storefront. Gain a front row seat to ecommerce, AI, and DXP trends in a multi - brand environment with global reach. We will support you with ad hoc trainings and networking opportunities across other functions and brands! At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Handson AI in the real world: go from idea to pilot to measurable impact across multiple brands’ ecommerce experiences. - Mentorship & craft growth: guided learning in experimentation, prompt design, and AI product thinking; access to team playbooks and internal training. - Portfolio ready outcomes: ship case studies, prompt libraries, enablement assets, and experiment readouts you can proudly showcase. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011

unchangedJobs.title: Data Science Intern - EMEA Internship Program
unchangedJobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
unchangedJobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Data Science Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Data Science Intern for: - Supporting the Data Science product lifecycle management: Data Mining, Data Cleaning, Data Exploration, Feature engineering, Predictive modelling - Run ad hoc data extract and data transformation across different data source - Run preliminary explorative analysis to identify trends, patterns and correlations - Work in cloud environment accessing to the latest AI and GenAI technologies. What’s in it for you - Extensive exposure to different Data processing and Data Science technologies such as: Python, SQL - Exposure to end-to-end complex projects, with many chances to see how to relate with technical and business stakeholders in transformative processes inside a large Company - Exposure to Data Visualization and Business intelligence tools and creation of reporting across different domain and big data set How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges - You show initiative and strong drive to achieve yours and your team goals - First experience such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. unchangedJobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about Retail Technology and eager to explore how GenAI is transforming the consumer and store experience? As a Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, you will support the design, analysis and evolution of digital retail solutions across stores and omnichannel platforms, with a focus also on GenAI use cases, data‑driven decision making, and retail technology innovation. You will collaborate with cross‑functional teams to translate business needs into scalable, technology‑enabled solutions that enhance efficiency and customer experience. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for: - Support the analysis and documentation of retail technology processes (e.g. store systems, Order Management Systems, clienteling, order fulfilment, and omnichannel flows) - Contribute to GenAI initiatives, including use‑case discovery, functional analysis, prompt experimentation, and performance evaluation - Assist in translating business and user needs into functional requirements and solution concepts - Collaborate with product owners, engineers, data teams, and business stakeholders across EMEA - Contribute to data analysis, dashboards, or insight generation to support informed decision‑making - Support pilot initiatives, proof‑of‑concepts, and continuous improvement activities related to digital retail platforms How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong interest in Retail Technology, Digital Commerce, and Store Technologies - Solid understanding of Generative AI concepts (e.g. LLMs, prompt engineering, AI‑assisted analytics) and curiosity to apply them in a business context - Analytical mindset with the ability to structure problems and interpret data - Familiarity with digital platforms, data flows, APIs, or cloud‑based systems is a plus - Ability to collaborate effectively in cross‑functional and international teams - Proactive attitude, learning mindset, and willingness to experiment and iterate - Fluency in English (written and spoken); knowledge of additional languages is a plus - A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Technology, or similar is nice to have, but we are most interested in your curiosity, problem‑solving skills, and passion for retail innovation. What’s in it for you In this role, you will: - Gain hands‑on exposure to enterprise retail technology platforms used by global brands - Learn how GenAI is applied in real business scenarios, from process optimization to decision support - Work within an Agile, product‑driven environment, learning modern digital delivery practices - Collaborate with experienced product, technology, and business professionals across EMEA - Build a strong foundation for a career in Digital Retail, Product Management, or AI‑enabled Transformation By the end of the internship, you will have: - A practical understanding of retail digital ecosystems - Experience contributing to GenAI‑enabled initiatives - Increased confidence working with stakeholders, data, and technology solutions in a global organization The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Participate in dedicated skill-building workshops - Collaborate on an internal consulting group project - Gain real insights about our brands by spending one day of work in-store - Connect through networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007

descriptionByLocale.en: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about Retail Technology and eager to explore how GenAI is transforming the consumer and store experience? As a Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, you will support the design, analysis and evolution of digital retail solutions across stores and omnichannel platforms, with a focus also on GenAI use cases, data‑driven decision making, and retail technology innovation. You will collaborate with cross‑functional teams to translate business needs into scalable, technology‑enabled solutions that enhance efficiency and customer experience. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for: - Support the analysis and documentation of retail technology processes (e.g. store systems, Order Management Systems, clienteling, order fulfilment, and omnichannel flows) - Contribute to GenAI initiatives, including use‑case discovery, functional analysis, prompt experimentation, and performance evaluation - Assist in translating business and user needs into functional requirements and solution concepts - Collaborate with product owners, engineers, data teams, and business stakeholders across EMEA - Contribute to data analysis, dashboards, or insight generation to support informed decision‑making - Support pilot initiatives, proof‑of‑concepts, and continuous improvement activities related to digital retail platforms How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong interest in Retail Technology, Digital Commerce, and Store Technologies - Solid understanding of Generative AI concepts (e.g. LLMs, prompt engineering, AI‑assisted analytics) and curiosity to apply them in a business context - Analytical mindset with the ability to structure problems and interpret data - Familiarity with digital platforms, data flows, APIs, or cloud‑based systems is a plus - Ability to collaborate effectively in cross‑functional and international teams - Proactive attitude, learning mindset, and willingness to experiment and iterate - Fluency in English (written and spoken); knowledge of additional languages is a plus - A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Technology, or similar is nice to have, but we are most interested in your curiosity, problem‑solving skills, and passion for retail innovation. What’s in it for you In this role, you will: - Gain hands‑on exposure to enterprise retail technology platforms used by global brands - Learn how GenAI is applied in real business scenarios, from process optimization to decision support - Work within an Agile, product‑driven environment, learning modern digital delivery practices - Collaborate with experienced product, technology, and business professionals across EMEA - Build a strong foundation for a career in Digital Retail, Product Management, or AI‑enabled Transformation By the end of the internship, you will have: - A practical understanding of retail digital ecosystems - Experience contributing to GenAI‑enabled initiatives - Increased confidence working with stakeholders, data, and technology solutions in a global organization The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Participate in dedicated skill-building workshops - Collaborate on an internal consulting group project - Gain real insights about our brands by spending one day of work in-store - Connect through networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007

unchangedJobs.title: eCommerce Merchandising Intern - EMEA Internship Program
unchangedJobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
unchangedJobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as an eCommerce Merchandising Intern for Altra. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, p otential B usiness C ase) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to help shape how runners across EMEA discover and shop the world’s most innovative running footwear? Altra is looking for an Ecommerce Merchandising Intern to join our Digital team in Stabio and support the growth of one of the fastest‑rising brands in the running industry. Support the day‑to‑day operations of Altra’s EMEA ecommerce business by ensuring the right products are visible, discoverable, and performing online. You will analyse performance, enhance product presentation, optimise site experience, and help deliver a best‑in‑class online journey for runners across the region. Get ready to make an impact! As an eCommerce Merchandising Intern, you will: - Support the setup and optimisation of product assortments across EMEA, ensuring accuracy and consistency. - Monitor online product performance (sell through, conversion, availability) and provide actionable insights to the team. - Manage onsite merchandising including category updates, product ranking, search optimisation and homepage updates. - Coordinate product content needs with Brand, Studio and Copy teams to ensure premium product presentation. - Assist with go ‑ to ‑ market readiness , including seasonal launches and key commercial moments. - Contribute to broader ecommerce projects , cross-functional initiatives and digital experience improvements. How you will make a difference - You are fluent in English with strong written and verbal communication. - You are genuinely curious about ecommerce, consumer journeys and digital performance. - You have strong analytical thinking and enjoy working with numbers, trends, and dashboards. - You are organised, detail-oriented and reliable — product accuracy really matters to you. - You are proactive, collaborative and comfortable working with different stakeholders. - You bring energy, positivity and a willingness to learn in a fast-growing brand environment. A relevant degree (Business, Marketing, Digital, Data, Fashion Management) is nice to have, but we care more about your mindset, ambition, and eagerness to learn. What’s in it for you In this internship, you will: - Learn how an ecommerce business operates across multiple markets. - Develop strong merchandising skills used across the digital retail industry. - Become fluent in performance analysis, reporting, KPI interpretation and trading decisions. - Understand how content, product, operations, and marketing integrate to drive online results. - Gain hands-on experience working with enterprise ecommerce platforms and analytics tools. - Build relationships across an international, cross‑functional environment. At the end of your internship , you will have a strong understanding of ecommerce merchandising fundamentals, digital trading best practices, and real experience contributing to the growth of a premium performance running brand. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ​ Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260202-0007

Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ​ Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260202-0007
descriptionByLocale.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as an eCommerce Merchandising Intern for Altra. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, p otential B usiness C ase) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to help shape how runners across EMEA discover and shop the world’s most innovative running footwear? Altra is looking for an Ecommerce Merchandising Intern to join our Digital team in Stabio and support the growth of one of the fastest‑rising brands in the running industry. Support the day‑to‑day operations of Altra’s EMEA ecommerce business by ensuring the right products are visible, discoverable, and performing online. You will analyse performance, enhance product presentation, optimise site experience, and help deliver a best‑in‑class online journey for runners across the region. Get ready to make an impact! As an eCommerce Merchandising Intern, you will: - Support the setup and optimisation of product assortments across EMEA, ensuring accuracy and consistency. - Monitor online product performance (sell through, conversion, availability) and provide actionable insights to the team. - Manage onsite merchandising including category updates, product ranking, search optimisation and homepage updates. - Coordinate product content needs with Brand, Studio and Copy teams to ensure premium product presentation. - Assist with go ‑ to ‑ market readiness , including seasonal launches and key commercial moments. - Contribute to broader ecommerce projects , cross-functional initiatives and digital experience improvements. How you will make a difference - You are fluent in English with strong written and verbal communication. - You are genuinely curious about ecommerce, consumer journeys and digital performance. - You have strong analytical thinking and enjoy working with numbers, trends, and dashboards. - You are organised, detail-oriented and reliable — product accuracy really matters to you. - You are proactive, collaborative and comfortable working with different stakeholders. - You bring energy, positivity and a willingness to learn in a fast-growing brand environment. A relevant degree (Business, Marketing, Digital, Data, Fashion Management) is nice to have, but we care more about your mindset, ambition, and eagerness to learn. What’s in it for you In this internship, you will: - Learn how an ecommerce business operates across multiple markets. - Develop strong merchandising skills used across the digital retail industry. - Become fluent in performance analysis, reporting, KPI interpretation and trading decisions. - Understand how content, product, operations, and marketing integrate to drive online results. - Gain hands-on experience working with enterprise ecommerce platforms and analytics tools. - Build relationships across an international, cross‑functional environment. At the end of your internship , you will have a strong understanding of ecommerce merchandising fundamentals, digital trading best practices, and real experience contributing to the growth of a premium performance running brand. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? unchangedJobs.title: Sustainability Specialist
unchangedJobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
unchangedJobs.description: VF Corporation is looking for a Sustainability Specialist to join our Global Sustainability team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As a Sustainability Specialist , you’ll be working across VF and its portfolio of brands to drive transformative change in alignment with our Global Sustainability strategy and forthcoming regulatory requirements, with a particular emphasis on support to Brand sustainability operations. This role will be central to driving progress globally that contributes to VF’s global sustainability goals and prepares VF brands for sustainability-related regulatory compliance. The role will require adept relationship building skills across both internal and external stakeholders, giving you the opportunity to engage in multiple workstreams across VF’s organization. The Sustainability Specialist will be working closely with the VF Brands to support on the implementation of strategically relevant sustainability initiatives and processes. We expect that you will deliver exceptional results while fulfilling the following aspects of the Sustainability Analyst role: - Support on packaging initiatives across EMEA Brands, leading the implementation of existing programs & identifying, planning and executing new improvement opportunities across Brands in collaboration with internal stakeholder network, all in close alignment with eco-modulation opportunities globally foreseen by regulation. - Support VF Brands and commercial teams in fulfilling product sustainability surveys and data requests for key commercial partners. - Advising VF Brands on environmental claims and messaging, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements in EMEA (including but not limited to Empowering Consumers for the Green Transition Directive) - Support the team in the integration of circular economy principles into the day-to-day business, including support on data collection to ensure compliance with Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation ( ESPR) and Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) - Continuously monitor the evolving landscape of sustainability-focused regulatory requirements globally. - Support on team organization, planning, and day-to-day operational tasks. Critical work relationships: - Work horizontally across internal functions, incl. but not exclusive to Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Brand Product & Sales teams, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship team as well as external stakeholders - Work closely with Corporate & Government Affairs and Legal Counsel to continuously integrate regulatory developments into the VF operational process. Skills for Success We are looking for someone who: - A few years of work experience in sustainability, experience in the textile industry is a plus. - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Has excellent analytical skills & process thinking to translate complex issues into tangible & streamlined solutions. - Has deep expertise in data collection and analytics, process management and project management. - Has the ability to successfully support and prioritize multiple projects and teams at one time. - Has a pioneering spirit and feels confident in their ability to charter unchartered territory. - Is a strong communicator and enjoys working with people. - Has a keen interest in Sustainability, Climate Change, and the complex, interrelated environmental challenges faced by our industry and beyond. About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005

We expect that you will deliver exceptional results while fulfilling the following aspects of the Sustainability Analyst role: - Support on packaging initiatives across EMEA Brands, leading the implementation of existing programs & identifying, planning and executing new improvement opportunities across Brands in collaboration with internal stakeholder network, all in close alignment with eco-modulation opportunities globally foreseen by regulation. - Support VF Brands and commercial teams in fulfilling product sustainability surveys and data requests for key commercial partners. - Advising VF Brands on environmental claims and messaging, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements in EMEA (including but not limited to Empowering Consumers for the Green Transition Directive) - Support the team in the integration of circular economy principles into the day-to-day business, including support on data collection to ensure compliance with Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation ( ESPR) and Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) - Continuously monitor the evolving landscape of sustainability-focused regulatory requirements globally. - Support on team organization, planning, and day-to-day operational tasks. Critical work relationships: - Work horizontally across internal functions, incl. but not exclusive to Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Brand Product & Sales teams, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship team as well as external stakeholders - Work closely with Corporate & Government Affairs and Legal Counsel to continuously integrate regulatory developments into the VF operational process. Skills for Success We are looking for someone who: - A few years of work experience in sustainability, experience in the textile industry is a plus. - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Has excellent analytical skills & process thinking to translate complex issues into tangible & streamlined solutions. - Has deep expertise in data collection and analytics, process management and project management. - Has the ability to successfully support and prioritize multiple projects and teams at one time. - Has a pioneering spirit and feels confident in their ability to charter unchartered territory. - Is a strong communicator and enjoys working with people. - Has a keen interest in Sustainability, Climate Change, and the complex, interrelated environmental challenges faced by our industry and beyond. About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005
